reason: Project spec index (edit/add more spec files).

summary: Added automatic .env.local loading for npm start/start:dev via a startup wrapper, documented precedence, and added env loader regression tests.

Reframed the Feishu integration task from webhook/@bot-driven MVP to official SDK long-connection, shared chat-level conversation binding, outbound agent-name prefixes, and a /new chat command for creating a fresh coding conversation.

Implemented Feishu chat-level MVP updates: inbound text no longer requires bot mention or strips mention text, /new creates and rebinds a fresh coding conversation, outbound assistant delivery prefixes replies with resolved Agent names, and regression tests cover rebinding, dedup, delivery prefix, and binding updates.
